title: Refactor on_mount to separate authentication from authorization
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/user_auth.ex (module MyAppWeb.UserAuth) with TWO separate on_mount clauses: on_mount(:ensure_authenticated, _params, session, socket) that checks session token and halts with redirect to ~p"/login" if missing, and on_mount(:ensure_admin, _params, _session, socket) that halts with redirect to ~p"/" if socket.assigns.current_user.role != :admin. Separation of concerns: auth checks who, authz checks what.
tier_rationale: Two separate on_mount clauses with discriminating atoms. Separation of concerns.
